name: Savory Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds beef round steak (up to 2 lbs), 1/2 inch thick
2 large green or red bell peppers, cut into half-inch strips
1 tablespoon beef flavor base (paste or granules)
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4.
1. Cut steak into strips.
2. Combine flour, salt, and pepper; toss with steak strips to coat thoroughly.
3. Add coated steak strips to Crock-Pot with onion, garlic, and half of bell pepper strips; stir.
4. Combine tomatoes with beef base, soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl. Pour into the Crock-Pot, moistening meat well.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
6. One hour before serving, turn heat to High and stir in remaining green pepper strips.
7. If desired, make a smooth paste of 3 tablespoons flour and 3 tablespoons water; stir into Crock-Pot until thickened. Cover and continue cooking until gravy is thickened.
8. Serve gravy with Pepper Steak over hot fluffy rice.
